news.t: ETF Wrap: A small-cap ETF has surged over 30% in 2021, handily beating the S&P 500. Can it do it again in 2022?

holdings.infoBox: EES is an equity ETF with a total of 889 individual holdings. The top holdings are Venture Global stock at 1.28%, Organon & Co. at 0.86%, Matson at 0.76%, Garrett Motion at 0.74%, and BGC Group at 0.73%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree U.S. SmallCap Fund (EES) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree U.S. SmallCap index. The fund tracks an index of US small-cap stocks weighted by firms' earnings from core operations. The index is a small-cap subset of the WisdomTree Earnings Index. EES was launched on Feb 23, 2007 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: ETF Wrap: A small-cap ETF has surged over 30% in 2021, handily beating the S&P 500. Can it do it again in 2022?
data.text: Happy holidays! It is the eve before Christmas Eve.
